layFlat.toggleHint: Click a face on the mesh to lay it flat on the print bed (Esc to cancel)
layFlat.resetHint: Restore the mesh to its original STL orientation

explodedView.toggleHint: Show the two silicone halves moved apart so the cavity is visible

printableParts.toggleHint: Show the printable 3D-print parts (base, sides, top cap) around the silicone

generate.hint: Orient the part on its base (use Place on face in the toolbar), then click Generate.
generate.done: Generated — click to re-run with current parameters.
generate.staleParams: Parameters changed. Click Generate to update.

notice.masterRepaired: Repaired non-manifold STL on load ({{removed}} triangles removed).

errors.singleFile: Drop one file at a time
